response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps tooling, and open-source GIS platforms, with no evidence of low-level hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education (BS in CS) and experience do not meet required seniority thresholds for principal level in hardware performance

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
Web-focused career vs. hardware-software co-design requirements
